email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Customer Service Representative bij UNIQUE OFFICE in Mechelen. Uw oproep voor een administratief sterke, klantgerichte medewerker met internationale contacten sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en vaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor de opvolging van projecten van A tot Z, van planning tot oplevering. Ik onderhoud dagelijks contact met klanten en leveranciers, beheer meerdere dossiers tegelijk en werk nauwkeurig, ook onder druk. Mijn ervaring met ERP-systemen (via projecten) en digitale toepassingen is sterk, en ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, met een groeiende kennis van het Nederlands (B1, in opleiding).

Ik ben leergierig, flexibel en oplossingsgericht. De combinatie van administratieve taken, klantcontact en internationale samenwerking spreekt mij zeer aan. Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn bijdrage te leveren aan uw team.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at UNIQUE OFFICE in Mechelen. Your call for an administratively strong, customer-oriented employee with international contacts perfectly matches my experience and skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for end-to-end project follow-up, from planning to delivery. I maintain daily contact with clients and suppliers, manage multiple dossiers simultaneously, and work accurately even under pressure. My experience with ERP systems (via projects) and digital applications is strong, and I speak fluent English and Turkish, with growing Dutch proficiency (B1, currently taking classes).

I am eager to learn, flexible, and solution-oriented. The combination of administrative tasks, customer contact, and international collaboration appeals to me greatly. I look forward to contributing to your team.

I would be happy to elaborate on my motivation in a personal interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Customer Service Representative bij UNIQUE OFFICE in Mechelen. Uw oproep voor een administratief sterke, klantgerichte medewerker met internationale contacten sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en vaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor de volledige opvolging van projecten, van planning tot oplevering. Ik onderhoud dagelijks contact met klanten en leveranciers, beheer meerdere dossiers tegelijk en zorg voor een nauwkeurige afhandeling. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd om gestructureerd en oplossingsgericht te werken, ook onder druk. Mijn ervaring met ERP-systemen (via projecten) en digitale toepassingen is sterk, en ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, met een groeiende kennis van het Nederlands (B1, in opleiding).

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is de combinatie van administratieve taken, klantcontact en internationale samenwerking. Ik ben leergierig, flexibel en werk graag in een dynamische omgeving. Uw bedrijf, als internationale distributeur van chemische grondstoffen, biedt precies de uitdaging die ik zoek. Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn nauwkeurigheid, communicatieve vaardigheden en digitale kennis een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw team.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at UNIQUE OFFICE in Mechelen. Your call for an administratively strong, customer-oriented employee with international contacts perfectly matches my experience and skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for end-to-end project follow-up, from planning to delivery. I maintain daily contact with clients and suppliers, manage multiple dossiers simultaneously, and ensure accurate handling. This experience has taught me to work in a structured and solution-oriented manner, even under pressure. My experience with ERP systems (via projects) and digital applications is strong, and I speak fluent English and Turkish, with growing Dutch proficiency (B1, currently taking classes).

What appeals to me in this role is the combination of administrative tasks, customer contact, and international collaboration. I am eager to learn, flexible, and enjoy working in a dynamic environment. Your company, as an international distributor of chemical raw materials, offers exactly the challenge I am looking for. I am confident that with my accuracy, communication skills, and digital knowledge, I can make a valuable contribution to your team.

I would be happy to elaborate on my motivation in a personal interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• End-to-end order and project follow-up experience (Episto: from planning to delivery, client and supplier contact)
• Strong digital skills: ERP systems, CRM, and office tools; quick to learn new software
• Fluent English and Turkish, Dutch B1 (actively improving)
• Accurate and organized: manages multiple dossiers simultaneously in a fast-paced environment
• Customer-oriented and solution-driven: daily client and supplier communication, problem-solving
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service · Order Management · Client Support
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with a strong administrative and customer service mindset, experienced in end-to-end order and project follow-up, client and supplier communication, and digital tools. At Episto, I manage multiple client projects simultaneously, ensuring accurate and timely delivery while maintaining clear communication with all stakeholders. I am detail-oriented, organized, and thrive in fast-paced environments. I speak fluent English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (B1). Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and flexible to work in Mechelen.

CORE SKILLS
- Order & project follow-up: end-to-end management, from intake to delivery
- Client & supplier communication: daily contact, problem-solving, relationship building
- ERP & digital tools: experience with ERP systems, CRM, Google Workspace, Microsoft Office
- Accuracy & organization: managing multiple dossiers simultaneously, attention to detail
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1, actively learning)
- Additional: SEO, content management, WordPress (from previous roles)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage end-to-end client projects: from initial contact and planning to delivery and follow-up
- Maintain daily communication with clients and suppliers to ensure project milestones are met
- Coordinate multiple projects simultaneously, prioritizing tasks to meet deadlines
- Track project performance and provide regular updates to stakeholders
- Use digital tools (SEMrush, Google Analytics, etc.) to support decision-making

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Collaborated with team members to ensure smooth operations

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)
- Worked closely with cross-functional teams to deliver user-friendly interfaces

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site; managed full project lifecycle
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve online visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
